sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69059" key="muqw|do/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῡθ-ῳδός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n69059.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">singer of mythic tales</tr_>, cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μυδώδας</foreign> (acc. pl.) in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).211</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
